sections.paragraph:
(“whose father is exultation”), [Abigail], pr.n.f.-

(1) of the Wife of Nabal, afterwards of David, 1Sa 25:3, 14 1Sa 25:14, which name is also contracted אֲבִיגַל (comp. Arab. أَشْ for أَيْشَ what?) verse 32 1Sa 25:32, and 2Sa 3:3. (כ׳).-(2) a sister of David, 1Ch 2:16, also called אֲבִיגַל 2Sa 17:25.
